option.DisplayText: {{C|Choose Your Body Plan}}: Turn on debug logging for this mod.
option.helptext:
When enabled, the mod will output verbose logs to Player.log tracing program flow specifically within the mod.
The default is {{w|Disabled}}.

When enabled, body plan selection is sorted by category, otherwise they are sorted alphabetically.
Irrespective of sorting method, the {{W|default body plan}} that would result from your other character builder choices will be marked as such and appear at the top.
{{Y|Note: Changing the sort order in the body plan selection window toggles this option so that your last choice is remembered.}}
The default is {{W|Enabled}}.

option.DisplayText: Enable body plan selection for True Kin.
option.helptext:
When enabled, body plan selection is avaialable to True Kin.
{{r|Be warned}}: several body plans are inherently incapable of installing cybernetics despite the creature itself being genotypically capable.
An effort has been made to mark these body plans as {{r|cybernetically incompatible}}.
The default is {{w|Disabled}}.

option.DisplayText: Enable body plans that are otherwise available via {{m|cooking recipes}}.
option.helptext:
When enabled, body plans that the player can access through normal play by way of {{m|cooking recipes}} will available to select from.
Selecting one of these body plans will mark your character as having already "consumed" the relevant recipe if consuming that recipe would prevent you from consuming it again.
The default is {{w|Disabled}}.

option.DisplayText: Enable body plans that are for robots.
option.helptext:
When enabled, body plans that are typically for robots will be available.
{{r|Be warned}}: by default, selecting one of these body plans will make your character {{c|mechanical}}.
The default is {{w|Disabled}}.

option.DisplayText: Enable body plans that are for robots making you {{c|mechanical}}.
option.helptext:
When enabled, body plans that are for robots will make you {{c|mechanical}}.
The default is {{W|Enabled}}.
